# Checksums for project artifacts
# Generated by T006 and updated by T008 config loader initialization
# Format: <algorithm>:<hash>  <relative_path>
# This file is used to verify data integrity across runs.

# Example entries (actual hashes generated at runtime):
# sha256: <hash>  data/processed/preprocess.yaml
# sha256: <hash>  artifacts/analysis_results.json
# Note: Actual checksums are generated by code/checksum_utils.py
